violations.text: 1 door reach in was observed held at an ambient of 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods in unit were evaluated at the time of inspection. 1 door reach in's dial was adjusted and held an ambient of 41 DF at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The dish washing machine was observed in poor repair. Establishment is using 3-bay sink to wash rinse and sanitize and should not use dish washing machine until it is properly adjusted and serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The Mechanical dish machine located in the kitchen area was not operating correctly. The machine was asking for sanitizer to be added even though the chemical sanitizer was full. Through interview with Person in charge it was determined that the machine was working prior. 3 Bay sink was filled and the utensils were sanitized in the 3 bay. Establishment is to have the machine repaired. Establishment is to continue to use three bay until machine is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023
